

# Ordination and Statistical Analysis

```{r setup-0500-results-ordination}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = "fig/0500-results-ordination/", dev = "png")
```

<!-- NMDS ordination with stress assessment.
     envfit: environmental variables correlated with community structure.
     Indicator species analysis (indicspecies::multipatt).
     PERMANOVA for among-site differences.
     Betadisper for multivariate dispersion. -->
